# Workspace Tools

Workspace lifecycle and execution tools for task-specific sandboxes.

## Toolbox
- `workspace`

## Runtime
- `toolbox.py`

## Tools
- [[tool/external/workspace/create]]
- [[tool/external/workspace/list]]
- [[tool/external/workspace/run]]
- [[tool/external/workspace/keep]]
- [[tool/external/workspace/remove]]

## Shared Boundary
- Workspace tools operate on managed runtime workspaces only.
